name: Special case illusion
description: A diagram appears general but encodes a special case.
responsible_check: Vary the configuration and prove generally.

name: Scale distortion
description: Visual scale exaggerates or hides geometric relation.
responsible_check: Inspect units axes scale and measurement.

name: Projection loss
description: A lower-dimensional view loses structure from the original object.
responsible_check: Document what the projection preserves and omits.

name: Numerical artifact
description: A computational image reflects step size or precision rather than true structure.

name: False visual proof
description: A picture suggests a theorem without valid justification.
